initiatives.name: Flying Squirrel Community Space
initiatives.description: A collectively-run community space fostering mutual aid, education, and grassroots organizing in Rochester. They provide a hub for community events, political education, art exhibitions, and resource sharing while building networks of solidarity through participatory democracy and direct action.

initiatives.name: Roc Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: Rochester Food Not Bombs recovers resources to create free vegetarian and vegan meals in our local community.
